title: Speaking - Part 4
description: The examiner will ask you questions related to the theme from Part 3. Express and develop your opinions with your partner.

content.task: Discussion on migration and cultural diversity.

questions.question: How do you think immigration affects the cultural identity of a country, both positively and negatively?
Do you think countries have an obligation to accept refugees and asylum seekers? What are the practical and ethical considerations?

script.text: How do you think immigration affects the cultural identity of a country, both positively and negatively?
Thank you. That is the end of the test.
